description_long: This object is a modern umbrella with a wide, angular canopy rendered in a bright blue color. The canopy has a geometric, faceted design, giving it a contemporary and stylized appearance. The shaft is slender and brown, with a slightly irregular, polygonal profile, suggesting a lightweight construction. The handle is straight and integrated into the shaft, lacking any visible curvature or ergonomic shaping. The tip of the umbrella is pointed, matching the angular style of the canopy. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible patterns or decorative elements on the canopy.
description: A modern blue umbrella with a faceted canopy and a straight, brown shaft. The design is angular and minimalistic, with a pointed tip and no visible handle curvature.
description_view_0: The umbrella is seen from the side, highlighting the wide, angular blue canopy and the straight brown shaft.
description_view_1: A narrow end-on view, showing the pointed tip of the canopy and the slim profile of the shaft.
description_view_2: A rear three-quarter view, emphasizing the broad, faceted canopy and the straight shaft.
description_view_3: A direct rear view, showing the pointed end of the canopy and the straight shaft aligned vertically.
